nasb.text: Abimelech said to Abraham, “What do these seven ewe lambs mean, which you have set by themselves?”

esv.text: And Abimelech said to Abraham, “What is the meaning of these seven ewe lambs that you have set apart?”

cnv.text: 亞比米勒問亞伯拉罕：“你把這七隻母羊羔放在另外一處，是甚麼意思呢？”

ccb.text: 亚比米勒问亚伯拉罕：“你分出七只母羊羔是什么意思？”

csbs.text: 亚比米勒问亚伯拉罕：“你分出来另放一处的这七只小母羊，是作什么的呢？”
